page: Amazon Web Services c8ib.32xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance powered by Intel processors. It features 128 virtual CPUs mapped to 64 physical cores with 2.0 threads per core, running on dedicated CPU allocation at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance operates on the x86_64 architecture and utilizes the Nitro hypervisor.

The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated graphics processing units. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps.

Given its high compute-to-memory ratio and high-speed network interface, this server is designed for compute-intensive workloads. Suitable applications include high-performance computing, batch processing, distributed analytics, and compute-heavy web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services c8ib.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 vCPUs and 64 physical Intel cores running at 3.9 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and the Nitro hypervisor, it provides dedicated CPU allocation with 256.0 GB of RAM, equating to 2.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, but it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps. This configuration is engineered for compute-heavy workloads such as batch processing, distributed analytics, and high-performance computing tasks requiring high network throughput and dedicated CPU resources.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8ib.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and a 133 Gbps baseline network bandwidth powered by 3.9 GHz Intel processors.

tagline: A compute-optimized x86_64 instance featuring one hundred twenty-eight vCPUs, two hundred fifty-six gigabytes of RAM, and high-speed baseline networking.
